title: New #1 open-source AI model is here!
summary: GLM 5.2 is reviewed as a top open-source AI model with capabilities across digital visualization, animation, 3D modeling, code generation via Claude integration, ray tracing, music composition, and mathematical animation. The model is accessible via Z.ai chat interface and includes coding plan subscriptions.
writeup: The video from AI Search reviews GLM 5.2, presented as a leading open-source AI model. Coverage spans digital visualization, animation, 3D modeling, ray tracing, music composition, mathematical animation, and code generation through Claude integration. The model is accessible through the Z.ai chat interface, with coding plan subscriptions available.
